project.name: Post-Onboarding Audit - Application Flow Bug Fixes

stories.title: Fix undefined syncMutation in OrgProfileSettings
stories.description: OrgProfileSettings.tsx references syncMutation.isPending on lines 291 and 296, but syncMutation is never defined. This crashes the Sync to Skills button. Fix: replace syncMutation references with a local loading state since handleSyncToSkills is a plain async function, not a mutation.

stories.title: Add skip/cancel button to RecordingSetupWizard
stories.description: RecordingSetupWizard was changed from Dialog to Card, removing the ability to dismiss. Users are now stuck in the wizard. Add a Skip/Cancel button that calls handleSkipToEnd().

stories.title: Add image onError fallback in NotetakerSettingsTab
stories.description: NotetakerSettingsTab line 572 renders an img tag with no onError handler. If the image fails, user sees broken image. Add onError fallback to show icon instead.

stories.title: Fix waitlistService .single() calls that can error
stories.description: waitlistService.ts uses .single() on lines 209 and 231 which throws PGRST116 when no record is found. Line 209 already handles this error but line 231 (validateReferralCode) should use .maybeSingle() instead since a missing referral code is a valid case.
